title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. bructerum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. bructerum, also known as Black Hawk's feather, is a subspecies of the Hieracium nigrescens plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. bructerum include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and promote the healing of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Hieracium nigrescens subsp. bructerum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
